summary: The diff modifies frontend files (useQueries.ts, AdminDashboard.tsx, AdminLoginForm.tsx) to fix admin dashboard queries and display for appointments and feedback. However, no backend files are modified, leaving REQ-1 and REQ-2 (backend fixes) unimplemented.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the backend query so that the admin can retrieve all appointment requests. Ensure the appointment listing function returns all appointments (including pending ones) when called by an authenticated admin, and that the access control check correctly identifies admin callers.
missing_requirements.reason: No backend files were modified in the diff. The backend getAllAppointments function and its access control logic were not changed. Only frontend files were touched.

missing_requirements.requirement: Fix the backend query so that the admin can retrieve all feedback submissions. Ensure the feedback listing function returns all feedback entries (including unapproved/pending ones) when called by an authenticated admin, and that the access control check correctly identifies admin callers.
missing_requirements.reason: No backend files were modified in the diff. The backend getAllFeedback function and its access control logic were not changed. Only frontend files were touched.
